scores.correctness_notes: All events from the gold standard are present: lifecycle, relation, storage, container/pebble, action, secret, leader, and status hooks. Missing collect_metrics (deprecated) and pre/post_series_upgrade is mentioned. The response also correctly notes pebble_check_failed and pebble_check_recovered are missing (actually the gold standard has them but agent's response omits them) — wait, agent omits pebble_check_failed and pebble_check_recovered. Minor gap but otherwise comprehensive.
